member.name: T:FeeDataType
member.summary: Enum for the fee data types.

member.name: T:FeeDataType_2
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type has no additional attributes

member.name: T:FeeDataType_3
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes an operation on a fungible/common token

member.name: T:FeeDataType_4
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes an operation on a non-fungible/unique token

member.name: T:FeeDataType_5
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes an operation on a fungible/common token with a custom fee schedule

member.name: T:FeeDataType_6
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes an operation on a non-fungible/unique token with a custom fee schedule

member.name: T:FeeDataType_7
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes a ScheduleCreate containing a ContractCall.

member.name: T:FeeDataType_8
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes a TopicCreate with custom fees.

member.name: T:FeeDataType_9
member.summary: The resource cost for the transaction type includes a ConsensusSubmitMessage for a topic with custom fees.
